Package org.eventb.internal.core.tool.state

Class StateRepository<I extends IState>

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.tool.state.StateRepository<I>
All Implemented Interfaces:
IStateRepository<I>
Direct Known Subclasses:
POGStateRepository, SCStateRepository
public abstract class StateRepository<I extends IState> extends Object implements IStateRepository<I>

    • debug

      public void debug()

    • getState

      public final <T extends I> T getState(IStateType<T> stateType) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IStateRepository
      Returns the state stored for the specified state type.
      Specified by:
      getState in interface IStateRepository<I extends IState>
      Type Parameters:
      T - the Java type of the state
      Parameters:
      stateType - the type of the state
      Returns:
      the state stored for the specified state type
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if no state for the specified type has been set, (i.e. if the state was not initialised before being read), or if an exception has occurred earlier with this repository

    • getTypeEnvironment

      public final ITypeEnvironmentBuilder getTypeEnvironment() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IStateRepository
      Returns the type environment stored in the repository.
      Specified by:
      getTypeEnvironment in interface IStateRepository<I extends IState>
      Returns:
      the type environment stored in the repository
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if an exception has occurred earlier with this repository

    • setTypeEnvironment

      public final void setTypeEnvironment(ITypeEnvironmentBuilder environment) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IStateRepository
      Sets the type environment of this state repository.
      Specified by:
      setTypeEnvironment in interface IStateRepository<I extends IState>
      Parameters:
      environment - the type environment to set
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if the passed type environment is null or if an exception has occurred earlier with this repository

    • getFormulaFactory

      public FormulaFactory getFormulaFactory() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IStateRepository
      Returns the formula factory stored in the repository.
      Specified by:
      getFormulaFactory in interface IStateRepository<I extends IState>
      Returns:
      the formula factory stored in the repository
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if an exception has occurred earlier with this repository

    • setFormulaFactory

      public void setFormulaFactory(FormulaFactory factory) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IStateRepository
      Sets the formula factory of this state repository.
      Specified by:
      setFormulaFactory in interface IStateRepository<I extends IState>
      Parameters:
      factory - the formula factory to set
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if the passed formula factory is null or if an exception has occurred earlier with this repository

    • setState

      public final void setState(I state) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IStateRepository
      Set the specified state. The state type is accessible by means of IState.
      Specified by:
      setState in interface IStateRepository<I extends IState>
      Parameters:
      state - the state to set
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if the state equals null or if an exception has occurred earlier with this repository

    • removeState

      public final void removeState(IStateType<? extends I> stateType) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IStateRepository
      Remove the state of the specified type from the repository. It is not important if the repository contains a state of the specified type or not. If such a state is not contained, nothing happens.
      Specified by:
      removeState in interface IStateRepository<I extends IState>
      Parameters:
      stateType - the state type of the state to be removed
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if an exception has occurred earlier with this repository
